---
title: "Margaret Heitland"
---

## Margaret Heitland

**Dates:** (1860-1938)

**Maiden name:** (Bateson)

### Description

Editor of <i>The Queen</i> magazine, suffragist.

### Biography

She married in 1901.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 8th 1892

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
